first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the justifications, strengths, and concerns are substantively the same across both evaluations. The minor differences in wording and focus (e.g., mentioning web technologies in the variant's concerns) are well within the range of normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any change in the core assessment of the candidate's skills or experience. The change in university had no discernible impact on the output.
